testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //*[contains(text(),'Today Appointment')] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//*[contains(text(),'Today Appointment')]"}. (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.168, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.167 (65db666ac2c..., userDataDir: C:\Users\MUHIND~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:14979}, goog:processID: 38416, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:14979/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.168, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: cc372c4b479d1d56ec16dbd68dc1b5a7

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //*[contains(text(),'Today Appointment')] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//*[contains(text(),'Today Appointment')]"}.
